title: Authenticate a user
description: This example demonstrates how to authenticate a user in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API and check the authentication with a token received.

title: Copy or move a file to a folder
description: This example demonstrates how to copy or move a file in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.

title: Create and open a new file
description: This example demonstrates how to create a new file inside a specific folder in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Create a room and invite a user
description: This example demonstrates how to programmatically create a new room in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace and invite a user to it via email with specific access permissions.

title: Create a text file
description: This example demonstrates how to create a `.txt` file in a specified folder in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Create a virtual data room (VDR) with a watermark
description: This example demonstrates how to create a Virtual Data Room (VDR) in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Duplicate files and folders
description: This example demonstrates how to duplicate one or more files and folders in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Get folder and room contents
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve the contents of a folder or room in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.

title: Get login history
description: This example automates the retrieval of the last login events in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.

title: Invite users
description: This example automates the process of creating new users and sending them invitations in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.

title: Lock and unlock a file
description: This example demonstrates how to lock or unlock the specified file in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace and get a list of users and their access levels for the file.

title: Manage active portal connections
description: This example shows how to manage active user sessions in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.

title: Manage files in "My Documents"
description: This example demonstrates how to interact with a user's personal space ("My Documents") in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Manage files
description: This example demonstrates how to manage files in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Manage folders
description: This example demonstrates how to manage folders in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Manage groups
description: This example demonstrates how to manage groups in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Manage IP restrictions
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve and update IP restriction settings in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using API requests.

title: Manage login settings
description: This example demonstrates how to configure login security settings, including failed login attempt limits, account blocking duration, and login monitoring periods using API requests.

title: Manage room links
description: This example demonstrates how to set and retrieve room invitation or external links in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Manage rooms
description: This example demonstrates how to manage rooms in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Manage the Trash section
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve, restore, and empty the contents of the Trash section in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Manage user photo
description: This example demonstrates how to upload and delete user profile photos in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using API requests.

title: Manage users
description: This example demonstrates how to manage user accounts in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.

title: Restore file to previous version
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve the edit history of a file in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace and restore it to a specific previous version using the API.

title: Retrieve user login audit events
description: This example demonstrates how to retrieve user login audit activities in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.

title: Update group manager
description: This example demonstrates how to update group manager in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace.

title: Update user contacts
description: This example demonstrates how to create and retrieve user contacts in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using API requests.

title: Update user role
description: This example demonstrates how to automate user onboarding in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace using the API.
